subject: Swift Trigger 690738 is not an astrophysical event
body:
S. D. Barthelmy (GSFC), N. Gehrels (NASA/GSFC), D. M. Palmer (LANL)
and M. H. Siegel (PSU) report on behalf of the Swift Team:

Swift trigger 690738 (at 16:24:32 UT) is due to an on-board
misidentification of Sco X-1.  It does not represent an
astrophysical event.
